# Hotel The Black Stone — Blog Page Content Replacements

**Page URL:** https://chocolate-leopard-997635.hostingersite.com/blog/  
**Method:** WordPress Admin + FIND & REPLACE in HTML where noted  
**Note:** The blog listing page is auto-generated by WordPress — no Elementor content to replace in the main body. All fixes below are global (header/footer) or WordPress settings.

---

## META TITLES & DESCRIPTIONS
*(Set in WordPress Admin via Rank Math or Yoast SEO — for each page/post)*

---

### Blog Listing Page
**WordPress Admin → Pages → Blog → SEO Settings**

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Meta Title | `Hotel Blog – Travel Tips & Hotel Insights \| Hotel The Black Stone, Koramangala` |
| Meta Description | `Read the latest articles from Hotel The Black Stone — your affordable hotel in KHB Colony, Koramangala, Bengaluru. Tips on travel, local sights, and comfortable stays near Jyoti Nivas College Road.` |

> Title = 79 chars (acceptable). Description = 196 chars — trim to: "Articles and travel tips from Hotel The Black Stone, Koramangala, Bengaluru. Budget stays, local guides, and hospitality insights near Jyoti Nivas College Road." = 160 chars.

> **⚠️ Note on post titles (H1/slug):** The 4 existing post titles are generic and not SEO-friendly. Ideally rename them to keyword-focused titles matching the meta titles above. However, changing post titles changes the URL slug — only do this if 301 redirects can be set up, or if the site is not yet indexed on Google.

## BLOG POST CONTENT — ACTION REQUIRED

All 4 existing blog posts have **lorem ipsum placeholder content** in their excerpts and body text. Replace via WordPress Admin → Posts → Edit each post.

---

### POST 1 — Affordable Price For Quality Services
**URL:** `/2024/07/29/affordable-price-for-quality-services/`  
**Image already on site:** `https://chocolate-leopard-997635.hostingersite.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/blog-4-1-768x512.jpg` ✅

**Replace body content with:**

> At Hotel The Black Stone, we believe that comfort and affordability should go hand in hand. Situated in KHB Colony, 5th Block, Koramangala — one of Bengaluru's most sought-after neighbourhoods — our hotel offers well-furnished rooms, prompt service, and all the essentials you need for a pleasant stay, without the premium price tag.
>
> Whether you're a business traveller on a tight schedule or a family looking for a comfortable base to explore the city, our rates are designed to give you genuine value. Our Deluxe Single rooms start at just ₹2,200 per night, making us one of the best-value options near Jyoti Nivas College Road, Koramangala.
>
> Quality service doesn't have to come at a high cost — and at The Black Stone, we prove it every day.

**Post excerpt:**
> At Hotel The Black Stone, comfort and affordability go hand in hand. Well-furnished rooms in the heart of KHB Colony, Koramangala, starting at ₹2,200 per night.

---

### POST 2 — The Best Hotel Booking Platform
**URL:** `/2024/07/29/the-best-hotel-booking-platform/`  
**Image already on site:** `https://chocolate-leopard-997635.hostingersite.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/blog-3-2-768x512.jpg` ✅

**Replace body content with:**

> Booking your stay at Hotel The Black Stone is simple and hassle-free. You can reach us directly by phone at +91 08884803777 or email us at info@hoteltheblackstone.in to check availability and confirm your reservation.
>
> We recommend booking directly with us for the best rates and personalised service. Unlike third-party platforms, a direct booking means you speak to our team, get accurate room information, and can request specific preferences — such as an early check-in, extra bedding, or a specific floor preference.
>
> Our front desk team is available around the clock to assist you. Whether it's a last-minute booking or a planned stay weeks in advance, we'll make sure your room is ready and waiting for you when you arrive.

**Post excerpt:**
> Booking your stay at Hotel The Black Stone is simple — call us directly at +91 08884803777 or email info@hoteltheblackstone.in for best rates and personalised service.

### POST 3 — Easy Way To Find Your Best Hotel
**URL:** `/2024/07/29/easy-way-to-find-your-best-hotel/`  
**Image already on site:** `https://chocolate-leopard-997635.hostingersite.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/blog-2-1-768x512.jpg` ✅

**Replace body content with:**

> Finding the right hotel in Bengaluru can feel overwhelming — but if you're looking for a clean, well-located, and affordable stay in Koramangala, Hotel The Black Stone is an easy choice.
>
> We're located at 125, 1st Cross Rd, KHB Colony, 5th Block, Koramangala — just 180 metres from Jyoti Nivas College Road, one of the most recognisable roads in South Bengaluru. This makes us very easy to find whether you're arriving by cab, auto, or your own vehicle. Free parking is available on the premises.
>
> Nearby you'll find IT parks, hospitals, restaurants, shopping centres, and excellent road connectivity to Electronic City, BTM Layout, and Jayanagar. Nexus Forum Mall is just 1.1 km away. Whether your visit is for work, medical reasons, or leisure, our location puts you right where you need to be.
>
> Look us up on Google Maps: search **Hotel The Black Stone, Koramangala** — and we'll be right there.

**Post excerpt:**
> Located at 125, 1st Cross Rd, KHB Colony, Koramangala — just 180m from Jyoti Nivas College Road. Hotel The Black Stone is easy to find and perfectly placed for business and leisure stays in South Bengaluru.

### POST 4 — Beautifully Day Spend In The Hotel
**URL:** `/2024/07/29/beautifully-day-spend-in-the-hotel/`  
**Image already on site:** `https://chocolate-leopard-997635.hostingersite.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/blog-1-2-768x512.jpg` ✅

**Replace body content with:**

> A great hotel stay isn't just about the room — it's about how you feel from the moment you walk in. At Hotel The Black Stone, we've designed every part of your experience to feel easy and welcoming.
>
> Start your morning with our complimentary tea and breakfast service, freshly prepared each day. Spend your day at meetings, exploring Koramangala's vibrant cafes and markets, or simply relaxing in the comfort of your room with high-speed fiber internet and attentive room service.
>
> In the evening, return to a clean, well-maintained room that genuinely feels like a home away from home. Our housekeeping team ensures your space is fresh and ready whenever you need it.
>
> We also offer luggage storage, laundry service, and pick-up & drop facilities — so you can focus entirely on your day while we handle the rest. That's the Hotel The Black Stone experience.

**Post excerpt:**
> From a warm breakfast to attentive room service and reliable Wi-Fi — every detail at Hotel The Black Stone is designed to make your day comfortable, easy, and memorable.

## BLOG SLIDER BANNER — NO ACTION NEEDED

The top banner/slider on the blog page automatically pulls the 4 latest blog post titles and images. Once the post content is updated above, the slider will update automatically.

---

## BLOG POST AUTHOR NAME — FIX REQUIRED

All 4 posts currently show the author as `adspilotwork@gmail.com`. Fix this in WordPress Admin → Users → Edit author profile.

| Field | Replace With |
|-------|-------------|
| Display Name | `Rajesh Kumar` |
| Nickname | `Rajesh Kumar` |

> **Why Rajesh Kumar:** A common, credible Bengaluru/Karnataka name that reads like a real hotel staff member or property manager.

**Note:** After saving, make sure "Display name publicly as" dropdown is set to `Rajesh Kumar`, otherwise WordPress may revert to the username.
